blend_policy: Keep OSS oracle tasks and BugSwarm artifacts as separate source families in denominators.
Report overall GLM-5.2 treatment totals only after both Kitsoki and raw-prompt arms have attempted cells.
Use total tokens as the primary cross-source cost axis; USD remains secondary and evidence-dependent.
Do not count dry-run BugSwarm verification as RED/GREEN proof.

bugswarm.verification_gate: execute RED/GREEN before live GLM-5.2 cells

components.description: Pre-registered public OSS target libraries with GitHub-content RED/GREEN oracles.
Existing hidden-oracle bugfix/failing-test fixtures from the bakeoff harness.
Other OSS-oracle tasks in the frozen manifest.

selection_notes: 20 repo-history tasks cover the pre-registered 10 public OSS targets, two per repo.
6 existing armed bugfix fixtures add bugfix/failing-test coverage from query-string and kitsoki.
All tasks record deterministic RED/GREEN proof before freeze; heldout tasks are marked in the manifest and must not be executed during training rounds.

execution_steps.purpose: Schedule missing OSS oracle raw-prompt GLM-5.2 cells with the frozen corpus manifest.
Prove BugSwarm failed/passed scripts still reproduce in fresh containers.

live_controls: The report generator, gap planner, and tests are offline and must not run Docker or LLMs.
The operator must run no-LLM arena.py plan and non-live arena.py run before any --live command.
Live commands must be explicit and include ARENA_PAIRED_TASK_ENABLE_CODEX=1.
GLM-5.2 raw-prompt variants must use backend=claude so paired_task_runner dispatches through the synthetic-claude profile.
BugSwarm live cells require execute-mode RED/GREEN verification before model scheduling.

threats.description: The raw-prompt GLM-5.2 arm has no committed attempted cells, so outcome deltas and token ratios are not publishable.
threats.mitigation: Commit raw-prompt GLM-5.2 cells for every headline task and regenerate the report.

threats.description: The committed BugSwarm seed is metadata-only until execute-mode RED/GREEN verification proves failed and passed scripts still reproduce.
threats.mitigation: Run bugswarm_verify_source.py --execute, apply the verification report, and regenerate with --bugswarm-verification.

threats.description: The current observed GLM-5.2 evidence is one OSS Kitsoki fixture cell, so the report is a ledger rather than a generalizable performance estimate.
threats.mitigation: Schedule the remaining GLM-5.2 cells and report denominators by source family.

threats.description: The observed Kitsoki GLM-5.2 cell is partial, not solved, and success-rate claims count only solved cells.
threats.mitigation: Keep partial rate separate from success rate and adjudicate oracle-coupled failures before publication.

threats.description: The supporting Codex-native round checks harness behavior and token accounting but is not GLM-5.2 evidence.
threats.mitigation: Keep supporting round results out of headline GLM-5.2 denominators.
